name: the migration preserves each rule's original detector as the first required enforced_by binding (parity)
command: GCS="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" ruby -ryaml -e 'bad=0;Dir[ENV["GCS"]+"/*/*.yaml"].each{|f|d=YAML.unsafe_load_file(f) rescue next;next unless d.is_a?(Hash);(d["rules"]||[]).each{|r|next unless r.is_a?(Hash)&&r["id"];e=(r["enforced_by"]||[])[0];bad+=1 unless e.is_a?(Hash)&&e["tool"]==r["detector"]&&e["required"]==true}};STDERR.puts(bad.zero? ? "detector-preserved" : "dropped=#{bad}");exit(bad.zero? ? 0:1)'
